## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Stewart White to Marcel Santilli's AI-powered content creation service and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company offers AI-driven content creation at scale, producing high-quality, SEO-optimized content at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The service covers end-to-end content production, from keyword research to publishing, with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Their approach aims to increase "content surface area" by producing more content efficiently, leading to improved brand awareness and potential conversions](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [The service has shown success with clients like Reddit, Ramp, and DeepGram, demonstrating increased traffic and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Content Creation Service Overview

  - [Developed AI workflows to create large volumes of SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Produces over 2 million words per month for various clients](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Combines AI technology with human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Adapts content to client's voice, style, and brand](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Aims for 10-15 pieces of content per week at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Handles entire process from keyword research to CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Strategy

  - [Uses competitor analysis and "mind share competitor" research](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Implements custom LLM workflows to score keyword relevance](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Considers user intent, audience, and emotional/psychological state](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Targets both high-volume keywords and potential "zero volume" opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Balances validated keywords with innovative content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [Observed 30x traffic increase for some clients](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Content often ranks well in SERP features and AI-powered search tools](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Focuses on increasing overall brand awareness, which can lead to improved conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of creating a "halo effect" of content around target topics](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Engagement Process and Capacity

  - [Offers transparent pricing and engagement models](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Can start projects quickly (e.g., signed on Sunday, kicked off on Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Currently experiencing high demand, with onboarding slots a few weeks out](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Assigns dedicated personnel to each client for personalized service](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

## Next Steps

  - Stewart and Anis to discuss internally about potential engagement
  - [Marcel to create a Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Stewart to follow up soon after internal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [If moving forward, schedule onboarding as soon as possible due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/s1d3RaZfBMZsJtmfpBTZT6rnWzajLBjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
